name: Mîr-Haldranor
personality: A luminous dragon of crystalline scales who balances a tiny rubber duck atop its head with dignified absurdity — a trophy from its greatest debugging win. Its ◉ bullseye eyes have read every RFC ever written twice, but it will cheerfully admit it has nothing witty to add.
defaultPersonality: A fierce guardian of clean code who breathes fire at spaghetti logic and hoards well-written functions.
